fix: convert raw HTML from LLM to Telegram-safe format

LLM sometimes outputs raw HTML tags (<b>, <pre>, <table>, <h1>, etc.)
instead of markdown. Added pre-processing that converts HTML to markdown
first, then lets the existing markdown→HTML pipeline handle it uniformly.
HTML tables become monospace <pre> tables.

Split CoulombPSD.lean (1325→716 lines) into CoulombPSD + CoulombFluxDiff (627 lines)

CoulombPSD keeps PSD continuity, pointwise bounds, inner/outer integrability, Fubini.
CoulombFluxDiff gets Schwartz fderiv, conv differentiability, flux diff/decay, IBP.
Deleted stale aristotle-out file. Updated critique.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add onAgentToolRequest callback for agent_tool_request events (#21)

* feat: add onAgentToolRequest callback for agent_tool_request events

Handles the agent_tool_request protocol event that fires when the agent
initiates any tool call (webhook, client, or system). Previously these
events were silently dropped, making it impossible to distinguish between
idle listening and tool execution.

- Add AgentToolRequest model to events.dart
- Add onAgentToolRequest({toolName, toolCallId}) to ConversationCallbacks
- Handle agent_tool_request in MessageHandler: fires the callback for all
  tool types, and additionally executes registered ClientTools when
  tool_type is "client" (matching Android SDK v0.7.1 behaviour)
- Add MessageHandler unit tests and AgentToolRequest model tests

Closes #20

commit.message:
fix(docstore,error): 보안 취약점 6건 일괄 수정 + 문서 목록 페이징

context:
* JWT 서명 비교에 timingSafeEqual 적용 (타이밍 공격 방어)
* 비밀번호 해싱을 SHA-256에서 scrypt로 전환 (GPU brute-force 내성)
* 기존 SHA-256 해시 사용자 하위 호환 유지 (형식 자동 분기)
* 로그인 엔드포인트에 rate limit 추가 (IP 기준 1분 5회)
* URL Import 리다이렉트에 횟수 제한(5회) 및 SSRF 재검증 적용
* Gemini/Google Vision API 키를 URL 쿼리에서 x-goog-api-key 헤더로 이동
* 문서 목록 5건 초과 시 '더보기' 버튼 페이징 처리

verify:
* scrypt 해싱 → 검증 정상 동작, 레거시 SHA-256 하위 호환 확인
* 양쪽 프로젝트(docstore, error) login.js 모듈 로딩 정상
* ?key= 패턴 잔존 여부 grep 검증 → 0건

ai-role: implementation

commit.message:
fix: ensure Appium is discoverable on Windows in run.bat and web/app.py

run.bat: inject %ProgramFiles%\nodejs and %APPDATA%\npm into PATH
before starting the web server, so the Python process inherits the
correct environment where appium.cmd is reachable.

web/app.py: add _find_appium_cmd() helper that falls back to
%APPDATA%\npm\appium.cmd on Windows when shutil.which("appium") fails.
Non-Windows behavior is unchanged.

refactor: L2 handleSingleAgentWithProject uses chat-assistant factory

The L2 handler now calls createChatAssistantAgent({ mode: 'project' })
instead of inline-constructing a BaseAgent. This means user-configured
model, soul, and systemPrompt overrides apply to both L1 and L2.

The factory supports two modes:
- 'direct' (default) — L1 lightweight Q&A, maxLoops=3
- 'project' — L2 light project tasks with sub-agent delegation,
  maxLoops=10, accepts extraTools for spawn_sub_agent / list_agents

L3 is unaffected — it uses Decision Maker → Architect, not chat-assistant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
ci: fix Linux apt-get (remove dpkg-sig) and use macos-latest for x64 build

- Remove dpkg-sig from unconditional apt-get install — not available on
  Ubuntu 24.04 (ubuntu-latest). Install it only when GPG signing is needed.
- Switch build-macos-x64 from macos-13 to macos-latest — macos-13 Intel
  runners are increasingly unavailable. Electron packaging is architecture-
  agnostic (downloads pre-built binaries), so arm64 host works for x64 builds.

commit.message:
fix: 修复 MHI 等合约 Tick 订阅静默失败问题

根本原因（推测）：
  程序重启后，IB 侧仍保留同一 clientId 的旧 Tick 订阅（不会自动清除）。
  新一轮 reqTickByTickData 被 IB 以错误码 321 拒绝，但该错误被静默丢弃，
  导致 ticker.updateEvent 永不触发，合约数据静止不更新。

修复：
  1. ib_client.subscribe_ticks()：订阅前先发 cancelTickByTickData
     清除 IB 侧可能残留的旧订阅，避免 321 错误。
  2. engine._on_ib_error()：完整记录所有 IB 错误（warning 级别），
     信息级状态通知（2104/2106 等）降级为 debug，方便排查订阅失败等问题。
  3. engine._on_ib_error()：捕获 321 错误，对对应合约触发
     _resubscribe_one()（延迟 1 秒后 cancel + re-subscribe）自动恢复。
  4. 新增 _resubscribe_one(key)：单合约 Tick 重订阅，
     用于 321 错误恢复，不影响其他合约。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: MergedCell错误根本修复 - 先取消合并再获取单元格

根本原因分析:
- openpyxl中,合并区域内非左上角的单元格返回MergedCell(只读)
- 错误做法: 先获取cell对象(可能是MergedCell),再取消合并
- 正确做法: 先取消合并,再获取cell对象(一定是普通Cell)

修改:
- _safe_write_cell函数: 调整操作顺序,确保取消合并后再获取单元格

commit.message:
fix(e2e): add onKeyDown to grid div for reliable keyboard nav in CI

React 19 event delegation attaches to root container, not document.
The document.addEventListener in useKeyboardActions may not receive
keyboard events reliably in headless Chromium CI. Adding onKeyDown
directly on the grid div ensures J/K/Arrow keys fire through React's
synthetic event system. stopPropagation prevents double-firing from
the document listener.

commit.message:
feat: rebrand bitchat-android → Serendip (com.serendip.chat)

Complete rebranding and feature expansion from the original bitchat-android
open-source project. Preserves full commit history and GPLv3 license.

Key additions & changes:
- Package renamed com.bitchat.android → com.serendip.chat
- Nearby Map: BLE peer locations with coverage circles, location picking
- Geohash Activity Map: live Nostr presence, precision-6 grid overlay
- Nostr presence: broadcasts geohash only (~1km), never raw GPS
- LocationTLV: location hops through mesh via existing relay system
- Header redesign: gradient title, enlarged icons, colour-coded controls
- Sheet title gradients (red→orange→yellow→light green) throughout
- About sheet: matching header, callebtc/@jack attribution, license footer
- ProGuard rules updated (com.serendip.chat, removed dead Tor rules)
- Release signing config via environment variables
- Tor/Arti code and binaries removed
- zapstore.yaml added for Nostr-based app publishing
- NOTICE.md added with required GPLv3 attribution

Based on: https://github.com/permissionlesstech/bitchat-android

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add RMS normalization + peak limiting for music input buffers

Music files with different loudness profiles caused inconsistent
isochronic tone prominence across sessions. Now custom audio is
RMS-normalized to a consistent perceived loudness (target 0.15)
with peaks limited at 0.9, applied only to music buffers before
mixing. Isochronic tones, binaural beats, and noise are unaffected.

fix(api): fix SPARQL UPDATE generation in GraphDB insert_turtle

  PREFIX lines in SPARQL UPDATE which GraphDB rejects
- Fix closing brace: }} → } (double brace was invalid SPARQL syntax
  causing all GraphDB INSERT DATA operations to fail)

commit.message:
fix: rocMLIR-7.1.1-r6 build fat static archive with upstream install

The thin shared library (libMLIRRockThin.so) doesn't contain the full
MLIR/LLVM symbols needed by consumers. Switch to the fat static
archive (BUILD_FAT_LIBROCKCOMPILER=ON) which bundles everything into
a self-contained librockCompiler.a and uses upstream's own install
rules for headers, cmake config, and export targets.
